Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report — including on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of duplicated effort every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the backorder report, enriching each line item and flagging parts with no viable source as dead ends.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into a fully enriched, actionable status report — leadership sees the full picture instantly.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer-facing communications for backordered items, pre-populated with the relevant part status and estimated timelines.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Cuts the time to communicate order updates to customers from hours of manual drafting down to a single review-and-send step.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor fitments by make, model, and year.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in minutes that would take days to compile manually from three separate websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor fitments against DFC's existing two-piece rotor inventory to identify coverage gaps and overlap.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Immediately reveals which vehicle applications represent white space opportunities for DFC's product line, enabling faster sourcing decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking them to confirm demand for specific two-piece rotor fitments DFC does not yet carry.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Generates real demand signal data from actual customers without requiring any manual outreach effort from the sales or product team.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles the scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, ready-to-use decision-making document that consolidates research, gap analysis, and demand validation in one place.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creative copy, including headlines, body text, and CTA fields, across every live ad.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the complete universe of active ad copy in one pass, ensuring no flagged phrase can slip through an incomplete manual review.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for the specified phrases, flags exact matches, and records the ad ID, field name, and matching text for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Replaces a tedious and error-prone manual review of potentially hundreds of ads with a precise, repeatable scan completed in seconds.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged-copy report listing every match with the ad ID, platform, field name, and the exact copy where the phrase appeared.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts an actionable, evidence-based compliance or quality report in the right hands immediately, with no manual aggregation required.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications and extracts the resume, applicant name, email, and any role-specific subject line context.
Resume Bot.impact: Ensures every inbound application is captured and processed immediately, so no candidate falls through the cracks due to inbox volume.

Resume Bot.action: Files each resume PDF into the appropriate role folder in Drive with a standardized naming convention for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, organized, searchable resume archive automatically, eliminating manual file management for every application received.

Resume Bot.action: Scores each resume against the requirements of the relevant open role and produces a hiring recommendation — Approve, Deny, or Pending based on role status.
Resume Bot.impact: Dramatically reduces the time recruiters spend on initial screening by surfacing only qualified candidates and auto-handling clear rejections.

Resume Bot.action: Sends automated reply emails to denied and no-resume applicants, holds paused-role candidates in a Pending tab, and logs every decision with scores and notes to the Sheets dashboard.
Resume Bot.impact: Closes the loop with candidates professionally and instantly while giving the hiring team a live, organized dashboard of all applicant decisions with no manual data entry.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is tracking strong with 56 total agents — 28 completed, 10 in progress, and 18 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. The team continues to push forward on the 10 in-progress builds while the growing completed side of the pipeline is actively delivering value across email, ads, support, creator outreach, and more. Great work keeping the momentum going — more updates to come next week!
